name: Sampo Corporation
summary: Sampo Corporation manufactures and sells electrical and electronic products in Taiwan. Its products include audio and video products, such as televisions and DVD players; air conditioning devices; refrigerators and freezers; home washing machines; electrical household appliances, including fans, heaters, microwave and electric ovens, electric stoves, dehumidifiers, kitchen conditioning products, drink products, health and beauty products, vacuum cleaners, and mosquito lamps; and digital signage products. The company also engages in the contracted wholesale and retail sale of electronic and electrical products, and automotive products, as well as the provision of maintenance, repair, and other services; management of warehousing operations; and import and export business. Sampo Corporation was founded in 1936 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
